name: chr20_20q11_22_BCL2L1_SD
description: 20q11.21-q11.22 SD region containing BCL2L1 (BCL-xL), TPX2 and ID1; an amplification hotspot in solid tumors. Flanked by intermediate-size SDs (~30-80 kb) at 95-98% identity and embedded in the broader 20q pericentric SD field.

architecture.internal_structure: Direct SD blocks of 30-80 kb at 95-98% identity flanking the BCL2L1/TPX2/ID1 hub; somatic amplification of the SD-mediated cassette in multiple cancer types.
